serum_creatinine_mg_dl.note: Adult sex-specific reference intervals; dataset age range is 18-65 so elderly rule is not used here.

alt_u_l.note: Lab upper-limit reference intervals used for transform.

ferritin_ng_ml.source_label: CDC Nutrition Report and WHO ferritin guidance
ferritin_ng_ml.note: Premenopausal vs postmenopausal female split approximated with age 50 because menopause status is not consistently available.

notes: Same hybrid normalization logic as scripts/normalize_final_dataset.py, fit on the NHANES 2003-2006 real cohort.
